labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+051C
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 286 0 /uni051C
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+051C"
move 1400
